parameters.query: SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url, MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_test_recipient' THEN value END) AS email_test_recipient, MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_delivery_mode' THEN value END) AS email_delivery_mode FROM public.global_settings WHERE key IN ('n8n_base_url', 'email_test_recipient', 'email_delivery_mode');

parameters.jsCode: const input=$input.first().json??{}; const sqlLiteral=(value)=>"'"+String(value??'').replace(/'/g,"''")+"'"; const summaryCte=`summary AS (SELECT (SELECT count(*)::int FROM public.teams) AS total_teams,(SELECT count(*)::int FROM public.team_players) AS total_players,(SELECT count(*)::int FROM public.team_nicknames) AS total_nicknames,(SELECT count(*)::int FROM public.team_name_overrides) AS total_overrides)`; let sql=''; if(input.view==='teams'){ const seasonFilter=input.season?`WHERE t.season = ${sqlLiteral(input.season)}`:''; const editTeamSql=Number.isInteger(input.edit_team_id)?String(input.edit_team_id):'NULL'; sql=`WITH ${summaryCte}, season_rows AS (SELECT DISTINCT season FROM public.teams ORDER BY season DESC), team_rows AS (SELECT t.team_id AS id,t.team_name,t.section,t.season,t.sort_order,t.captain_name,t.captain_match_status,t.player_count,t.ready_for_mailout FROM public.vw_team_management_summary t ${seasonFilter} ORDER BY t.season DESC, t.section ASC, t.sort_order ASC, t.team_name ASC), selected_team AS (SELECT id, section, team_name, season, sort_order FROM public.teams WHERE id = ${editTeamSql}) SELECT (SELECT row_to_json(summary) FROM summary) AS summary, COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(to_jsonb(team_rows)) FROM team_rows), '[]'::json) AS team_rows, COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(to_jsonb(season_rows)) FROM season_rows), '[]'::json) AS season_rows, COALESCE((SELECT to_jsonb(selected_team) FROM selected_team), '{}'::jsonb) AS selected_team`; } else if(input.view==='players'){ const teamSql=Number.isInteger(input.team_id)?String(input.team_id):'NULL'; const editPlayerSql=Number.isInteger(input.edit_player_id)?String(input.edit_player_id):'NULL'; const lookupSql=sqlLiteral(input.lookup_q||''); sql=`WITH ${summaryCte}, team_options AS (SELECT id, team_name, section, season FROM public.teams ORDER BY season DESC, section ASC, sort_order ASC, team_name ASC), selected_team AS (SELECT id, team_name, section, season, sort_order FROM public.teams WHERE id = ${teamSql}), player_rows AS (SELECT team_player_id AS id, team_id, source_name, is_captain, player_sort_order AS sort_order, resolved_name, match_rule, category, membership_status, self_email, self_phone, self_consent, main_contact_name, main_contact_email, main_contact_phone, match_ui_status FROM public.vw_team_roster_consolidated WHERE team_id = ${teamSql} ORDER BY player_sort_order ASC, source_name ASC), lookup_rows AS (WITH raw_names AS (SELECT DISTINCT trim(concat_ws(' ', NULLIF(trim("First name"), ''), NULLIF(trim("Last name"), ''))) AS player_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(trim("Email address"), ''), '') AS email_address, 'raw_members' AS source_table FROM public.raw_members WHERE is_current IS TRUE UNION SELECT DISTINCT trim(concat_ws(' ', NULLIF(trim("First name"), ''), NULLIF(trim("Last name"), ''))) AS player_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(trim("Email address"), ''), '') AS email_address, 'raw_contacts' AS source_table FROM public.raw_contacts WHERE is_current IS TRUE), deduped AS (SELECT player_name, MAX(NULLIF(email_address, '')) AS email_address, string_agg(DISTINCT source_table, ', ' ORDER BY source_table) AS source_tables FROM raw_names WHERE player_name IS NOT NULL AND player_name <> '' GROUP BY player_name) SELECT player_name, COALESCE(email_address, '') AS email_address, source_tables, player_name || CASE WHEN email_address IS NOT NULL AND email_address <> '' THEN ' (' || email_address || ')' ELSE '' END || ' [' || source_tables || ']' AS label FROM deduped WHERE LENGTH(TRIM(COALESCE(${lookupSql}, ''))) >= 2 AND player_name ILIKE ('%' || TRIM(COALESCE(${lookupSql}, '')) || '%') ORDER BY player_name ASC LIMIT 25), selected_player AS (SELECT id, team_id, source_name, is_captain, sort_order FROM public.team_players WHERE id = ${editPlayerSql}) SELECT (SELECT row_to_json(summary) FROM summary) AS summary, COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(to_jsonb(team_options)) FROM team_options), '[]'::json) AS team_options, COALESCE((SELECT to_jsonb(selected_team) FROM selected_team), '{}'::jsonb) AS team_row, COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(to_jsonb(player_rows)) FROM player_rows), '[]'::json) AS player_rows, COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(to_jsonb(lookup_rows)) FROM lookup_rows), '[]'::json) AS lookup_rows, COALESCE((SELECT to_jsonb(selected_player) FROM selected_player), '{}'::jsonb) AS selected_player`; } else if(input.view==='mailout'){ const seasonSql=input.season?sqlLiteral(input.season):'NULL'; sql=`WITH ${summaryCte}, season_rows AS (SELECT DISTINCT season FROM public.teams ORDER BY season DESC), selected_season AS (SELECT COALESCE(${seasonSql}, (SELECT season FROM season_rows LIMIT 1)) AS season), mailout_rows AS (SELECT t.team_id AS id, t.team_name, t.section, t.season, t.sort_order, t.captain_name, t.captain_match_status, t.player_count, t.ready_for_mailout FROM public.vw_team_management_summary t JOIN selected_season s ON s.season = t.season ORDER BY t.section ASC, t.sort_order ASC, t.team_name ASC) SELECT (SELECT row_to_json(summary) FROM summary) AS summary, COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(to_jsonb(season_rows)) FROM season_rows), '[]'::json) AS season_rows, COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(to_jsonb(mailout_rows)) FROM mailout_rows), '[]'::json) AS mailout_rows`; } else if(input.view==='nicknames'){ const editSql=Number.isInteger(input.edit_nickname_id)?String(input.edit_nickname_id):'NULL'; sql=`WITH ${summaryCte}, nickname_rows AS (SELECT id, source, target, notes, created_at, updated_at FROM public.team_nicknames ORDER BY lower(source) ASC, lower(target) ASC), selected_nickname AS (SELECT id, source, target, notes FROM public.team_nicknames WHERE id = ${editSql}) SELECT (SELECT row_to_json(summary) FROM summary) AS summary, COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(to_jsonb(nickname_rows)) FROM nickname_rows), '[]'::json) AS nickname_rows, COALESCE((SELECT to_jsonb(selected_nickname) FROM selected_nickname), '{}'::jsonb) AS selected_nickname`; } else { const editSql=Number.isInteger(input.edit_override_id)?String(input.edit_override_id):'NULL'; sql=`WITH ${summaryCte}, override_rows AS (SELECT id, source, target, created_at FROM public.team_name_overrides ORDER BY source ASC, target ASC), selected_override AS (SELECT id, source, target FROM public.team_name_overrides WHERE id = ${editSql}) SELECT (SELECT row_to_json(summary) FROM summary) AS summary, COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(to_jsonb(override_rows)) FROM override_rows), '[]'::json) AS override_rows, COALESCE((SELECT to_jsonb(selected_override) FROM selected_override), '{}'::jsonb) AS selected_override`; } return [{json:{...input,sql}}];

const input=$('Resolve App Request').first()?.json??{}; const row=$('Load Page Data').first()?.json??{}; const parseMaybe=(value,fallback)=>{if(value===null||value===undefined||value==='') return fallback; if(typeof value==='string'){try{return JSON.parse(value);}catch{return fallback;}} return value;}; const clean=(value)=>value===null||value===undefined?'':String(value).trim(); const escapeHtml=(value)=>clean(value).replace(/&/g,'&').replace(//g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"').replace(/'/g,'''); const summary=parseMaybe(row.summary,{})||{}; const teamRows=parseMaybe(row.team_rows,[]); const seasonRows=parseMaybe(row.season_rows,[]); const selectedTeam=parseMaybe(row.selected_team,{})||{}; const teamOptions=parseMaybe(row.team_options,[]); const teamRow=parseMaybe(row.team_row,{})||{}; const playerRows=parseMaybe(row.player_rows,[]); const lookupRows=parseMaybe(row.lookup_rows,[]); const selectedPlayer=parseMaybe(row.selected_player,{})||{}; const nicknameRows=parseMaybe(row.nickname_rows,[]); const selectedNickname=parseMaybe(row.selected_nickname,{})||{}; const overrideRows=parseMaybe(row.override_rows,[]); const selectedOverride=parseMaybe(row.selected_override,{})||{}; const mailoutRows=parseMaybe(row.mailout_rows,[])||[]; const baseUrl=clean(input.n8n_base_url)||'http://n8n:5678'; const appUrl=baseUrl+'/webhook/team-management'; const actionsUrl=baseUrl+'/webhook/team-management-actions'; const mailoutUrl=baseUrl+'/webhook/generate-team-contact-sheets'; const mailoutViewUrl=appUrl+'?view=mailout'; const navItems=[{key:'teams',label:'Teams',href:appUrl+'?view=teams'},{key:'mailout',label:'Mailout',href:mailoutViewUrl},{key:'nicknames',label:'Nicknames',href:appUrl+'?view=nicknames'},{key:'overrides',label:'Overrides',href:appUrl+'?view=overrides'}]; if(input.view==='players'&&clean(teamRow.id)) navItems.push({key:'players',label:'Players',href:appUrl+'?view=players&team_id='+encodeURIComponent(clean(teamRow.id))}); const renderNotice=()=>clean(input.flash_error)?`
${escapeHtml(input.flash_error)}
`:(clean(input.flash_message)?`
${escapeHtml(input.flash_message)}
`:''); const renderSummaryCards=()=>[{label:'Teams',value:clean(summary.total_teams)||'0'},{label:'Players',value:clean(summary.total_players)||'0'},{label:'Nicknames',value:clean(summary.total_nicknames)||'0'},{label:'Overrides',value:clean(summary.total_overrides)||'0'}].map((item)=>`
${escapeHtml(item.label)}
${escapeHtml(item.value)}
`).join(''); const renderShell=(title,intro,bodyHtml)=>`${escapeHtml(title)}

${renderSummaryCards()}
${bodyHtml}
Team Admin

    • `).join('')}
Captain Mailout
